## Feature Request: [Title]

**Priority:** P1 (Critical) / P2 (High) / P3 (Medium) / P4 (Low)

---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

---

## Proposed Solution
How should this work? Include:

### User Stories
- As a [user type], I want [feature] so that [benefit]

### UI/UX Considerations
- [Describe the user interface]
- [Describe user interactions]
- [Mockups or wireframes if available]

### Technical Implementation
- API endpoints needed: `GET /api/...`, `POST /api/...`
- Database changes needed: [Describe schema changes]
- Components to create/modify: [List files]

---

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches were considered? Why were they rejected?

1. **Alternative 1:** [Description]
   - **Why rejected:** [Reason]

2. **Alternative 2:** [Description]
   - **Why rejected:** [Reason]

---

## Impact Assessment

### Breaking Changes
- [ ] Yes - Describe what breaks
- [ ] No

### Database Migration
- [ ] Yes - Migration file needed
- [ ] No

### Performance Impact
- [ ] None
- [ ] Low - [Describe]
- [ ] Medium - [Describe]
- [ ] High - [Describe]

### Security Considerations
- [ ] None
- [ ] New RBAC permissions needed
- [ ] New sensitive data handling
- [ ] Other: [Describe]

---

## Dependencies
- **Depends on:** [Issue/Ticket numbers]
- **Blocks:** [Issue/Ticket numbers]
- **Related:** [Issue/Ticket numbers]

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new technical debt
- [ ] Code review approved

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, references, or examples about the feature request here.
